---
title: "Model fit"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8)

library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(Dispatching)
```

```{css, echo = FALSE}

table, td, th {
  border: none;
  padding-left: 1em;
  padding-right: 1em;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  margin-top: 1em;
  margin-bottom: 1em;
}

```

# Model Fit {.tabset}

- Replace the cost side residuals with zero.

## Distance IV

### Wage

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/dist_IV/wage.png"))
```

### Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/dist_IV/fee.png"))
```

### Worker share

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/dist_IV/share_worker.png"))
```


### Client firm share

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/dist_IV/share_firm.png"))
```


## Distance IV (selected)

### Wage

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/dist_IV_selected/wage.png"))
```

### Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/dist_IV_selected/fee.png"))
```

### Worker share

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/dist_IV_selected/share_worker.png"))
```


### Client firm share

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/dist_IV_selected/share_firm.png"))
```



## Rivals

### Wage

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/rivals_IV/wage.png"))
```

### Fee

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/rivals_IV/fee.png"))
```

### Worker share

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/rivals_IV/share_worker.png"))
```


### Client firm share

```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/evaluate_fit/no_residuals/rivals_IV/share_firm.png"))
```
